title: NIO beats Wall Street's expectations in Q2 earnings and reports record-high EV deliveries
text: NIO achieved record Q2 deliveries of 57,373 premium smart electric vehicles, marking a 143.9% year-over-year increase from Q2 2023 and 90.9% growth from Q1 2024. The automaker secured over 40% market share in China's battery electric vehicle segment priced above RMB 300,000. Q2 2024 revenues reached RMB 17.446 billion ($2.4 billion), slightly exceeding Bloomberg analyst predictions of RMB 17.385 billion. Vehicle sales totaled RMB 15.68 billion ($2.16 billion), representing 118.2% year-over-year growth and 87.1% sequential growth. Operating losses decreased to RMB 5,209.3 million ($716.8 million), down 14.2% year-over-year and 3.4% from Q1 2024. NIO projects Q3 deliveries between 61,000-63,000 units (10.0%-13.7% YoY growth) and revenues of RMB 19.12-19.67 billion ($2.63-2.71 billion).
